results.rendered_html: dheya (von 1. dhā) adj. was geschaffen wird: sa ādiḥ sa madhyaḥ sa cāntaḥ prajānāṃ sa dhātā sa dheyaḥ sa kartā sa kāryam  MBH. 12,13108 . adj. und n. am Ende von Zusammensetzungen (gilt als n. für ein suff.; vgl.  P. 5,4,36, Vārtt. 2. 3 ); s. nāma˚, bhāga˚, mitra˚, ratna˚, rūpa˚, reto˚, śraddheya.

results.rendered_html:
dheya a.
1 To be held or taken.
2 To be produced.
3 To be fed or nourished.
4 To be drunk.
5 An affix, as in nāma˚, bhāga˚, q. v.
— yaṃ
1 Nourishing.
2 Drinking.
3 Holding, taking &c.
